PortfolioConfig.title: Portfolio Configuration
PortfolioConfig.description: Global user-editable portfolio configuration containing all works, biography text, profile photo, and active theme customization parameters.

works.description: An array of curated photo/video gallery projects with metadata descriptions and asset references.

descriptions.description: Detailed multi-paragraph description text, biography quotes, and primary face avatar/portrait image link.

contacts.description: Structured communication information such as email address link, custom telegram handler URL, and media kit files.

videos.description: Background looping video asset references mapping slot requirements for front-page visual accents.

appearance.description: Display parameters such as card transparency slider values for precise aesthetics control.

portfolio/config.description: The primary configuration document holding unified client-side state synchronized globally for all viewers.
